pc.label: Dålig Loderr
pc.name: Dwarf (Hill) Cleric 8
pc.languages: You can speak, read, and write Common and Dwarvish. Dwarvish is full of hard consonants and guttural sounds, and those characteristics spill over into whatever other language a dwarf might speak.

action.name: Longsword +1
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 3 slashing damage.

action.name: Battleaxe
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + 2 slashing damage.

action.name: Dagger +1
action.text: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 1d4 + 3 piercing damage.

action.name: Spiritual Weapon
action.text: Attack: +8 to hit. Hit: 1d8 + 5 force damage.
